personal.name: João Silva
personal.headline: Senior Software Engineer — Distributed Systems & Platform Architecture

summary: Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building distributed systems and web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, test-driven development, and mentoring junior engineers. Proven track record of delivering scalable solutions that serve millions of users.

experience.role_summary: Platform team — internal developer platform serving 200+ engineers
highlights: Led migration of monolithic application to microservices architecture, reducing deployment time by 80%
Designed and implemented real-time data pipeline processing 10M+ events/day using Kafka and PostgreSQL
Mentored 4 junior engineers through structured pair programming and code review practices
Reduced system latency by 40% through query optimization and caching strategy implementation

achievements.action: Built RESTful API serving 50K+ daily active users
achievements.result: enabling real-time data access for the entire customer base

achievements.action: Implemented CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
achievements.result: reducing release cycle from 2 weeks to daily deployments

achievements.action: Developed real-time notification system using WebSockets

highlights: Developed responsive web applications for 15+ clients using React and Node.js
Created automated testing suite achieving 90% code coverage across all client projects
Collaborated in agile team of 6 developers, delivering projects on time and within budget

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.name: FastAPI Admin
projects.description: Admin panel integration for FastAPI applications with role-based access control and automatic CRUD generation
highlights: Designed RBAC system supporting fine-grained permission assignment across 10+ resource types
Reduced boilerplate by 60% compared to manual admin panel implementation

projects.name: Personal Blog Platform
projects.description: Full-stack blog platform with Markdown support, tag system, and analytics dashboard serving 5K monthly visitors
